title: GST Services in Jharkhand | Virtual Auditor
description: GST Services in Jharkhand. From ₹2,999. FCA, ACS, CFE, IBBI RV. GST registration, monthly/quarterly return filing, GST audit. Contact +91 99622 60333.
bodyText:
What is gst registration, filing & appeal services? GST registration, monthly/quarterly return filing, GST audit, show cause notice reply, and GST appeal representation.
GST Registration, Filing & Appeal Services is a professional service offered by Virtual Auditor, an AI-powered CA and IBBI Registered Valuer firm (IBBI/RV/03/2019/12333) led by CA V. Viswanathan (FCA, ACS, CFE, IBBI RV), serving clients in Jharkhand, Jharkhand since 2012.
Quick Answer: GST Services in Jharkhand — GST registration, monthly/quarterly return filing, GST audit, show cause notice reply, and GST appea. From ₹2,999. Contact +91 99622 60333.

HEADING2: GST Registration, Filing & Appeal Services in Jharkhand
Virtual Auditor provides gst registration, filing & appeal services across Jharkhand. With offices in Chennai, Bangalore, and Mumbai, we serve businesses throughout Jharkhand with the same quality of FCA + ACS + CFE + IBBI RV-led professional services.
The ROC Patna (Jharkhand) handles company registrations and filings for Jharkhand. Stamp duty: As per state schedule. Professional tax: ₹2,500/year.

HEADING2: Our Service Scope
• GST Registration (New/Amendment)
• Monthly GSTR-1 & GSTR-3B Filing
• Quarterly GSTR-4 (Composition)
• Annual GSTR-9/9C
• GST Audit
• Show Cause Notice Reply (DRC-01)
• GST Appeal (Section 107)

HEADING2: Step-by-Step Process
• 1
HEADING3: Step 1: GST Registration
Apply via GST portal with PAN, Aadhaar, address proof
• 2
HEADING3: Step 2: Return Filing Setup
Configure filing frequency and HSN/SAC codes
• 3
HEADING3: Step 3: Monthly Compliance
GSTR-1 by 11th, GSTR-3B by 20th of following month
• 4
HEADING3: Step 4: Annual Return
GSTR-9/9C by 31st December
• 5
HEADING3: Step 5: Appeal/Notice
Reply to SCN or file appeal within statutory deadlines

HEADING2: Why Virtual Auditor for Jharkhand

HEADING2: Frequently Asked Questions

faqs.a: When turnover exceeds ₹40 lakhs (goods) or ₹20 lakhs (services). Also mandatory for e-commerce sellers, inter-state suppliers, and casual taxable persons.

faqs.q: What is the penalty for late GST filing?
faqs.a: ₹50/day (₹25 CGST + ₹25 SGST) for nil returns, ₹100/day for regular returns, subject to maximum of ₹5,000 per return.

faqs.q: Can you help with GST show cause notices?
faqs.a: Yes. We handle DRC-01 replies, Section 73/74 proceedings, and Section 107 appeals. AI-assisted order analysis within 24 hours.

faqs.q: Do you provide gst services services in Jharkhand?
faqs.a: Yes. Virtual Auditor serves clients across Jharkhand from our offices in Chennai, Bangalore, and Mumbai. We handle the complete process remotely with in-person meetings available at our nearest office. Contact +91 99622 60333.

faqs.q: What is the ROC jurisdiction for Jharkhand?
faqs.a: Companies registered in Jharkhand fall under ROC Patna (Jharkhand). Virtual Auditor handles all ROC filings for Jharkhand-registered companies.

faqs.q: What is the stamp duty for company registration in Jharkhand?
faqs.a: Stamp duty in Jharkhand: As per state schedule. Professional tax: ₹2,500/year. Contact us for exact computation based on your authorised capital.
